mapper.sql: select draft_id, company, product_name, product_number, search_name, product_type, product_sub_type, item_group_id, item_model_group_id, storage_dim_group_id, tracking_dim_group_id, buyer_group_id, invent_unit_id, purch_unit_id, sales_unit_id, unit_seq_group_id, purchase_price, sale_price, purch_tax_group_id, sales_tax_group_id, use_latest_purch_price, use_latest_cost_price, over_delivery_pct, under_delivery_pct, vendor_account, vendor_item_number, approved_vendor_check_method, lifecycle_state_id, retail_category_id, financial_dim_item_group, mobile_device_desc_line1, mobile_device_desc_line2, main_barcode, is_weighted, packing_barcodes_json, price_group_purch_price, price_group_sale_price, purch_from_date, purch_to_date, sales_from_date, sales_to_date, draft_status, submit_count, last_submit_time, d365_response, error_message, status, del_flag, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, remark from biz_draft_product
mapper.insert: insert into biz_draft_product ( company, product_name, product_number, search_name, product_type, product_sub_type, item_group_id, item_model_group_id, storage_dim_group_id, tracking_dim_group_id, buyer_group_id, invent_unit_id, purch_unit_id, sales_unit_id, unit_seq_group_id, purchase_price, sale_price, purch_tax_group_id, sales_tax_group_id, use_latest_purch_price, use_latest_cost_price, over_delivery_pct, under_delivery_pct, vendor_account, vendor_item_number, approved_vendor_check_method, lifecycle_state_id, retail_category_id, financial_dim_item_group, mobile_device_desc_line1, mobile_device_desc_line2, main_barcode, is_weighted, packing_barcodes_json, price_group_purch_price, price_group_sale_price, purch_from_date, purch_to_date, sales_from_date, sales_to_date, draft_status, status, create_by, create_time, remark ) values ( #{company}, #{productName}, #{productNumber}, #{searchName}, #{productType}, #{productSubType}, #{itemGroupId}, #{itemModelGroupId}, #{storageDimGroupId}, #{trackingDimGroupId}, #{buyerGroupId}, #{inventUnitId}, #{purchUnitId}, #{salesUnitId}, #{unitSeqGroupId}, #{purchasePrice}, #{salePrice}, #{purchTaxGroupId}, #{salesTaxGroupId}, #{useLatestPurchPrice}, #{useLatestCostPrice}, #{overDeliveryPct}, #{underDeliveryPct}, #{vendorAccount}, #{vendorItemNumber}, #{approvedVendorCheckMethod}, #{lifecycleStateId}, #{retailCategoryId}, #{financialDimItemGroup}, #{mobileDeviceDescLine1}, #{mobileDeviceDescLine2}, #{mainBarcode}, #{isWeighted}, #{packingBarcodesJson}, #{priceGroupPurchPrice}, #{priceGroupSalePrice}, #{purchFromDate}, #{purchToDate}, #{salesFromDate}, #{salesToDate}, 'draft', '0', #{createBy}, sysdate(), #{remark} )
mapper.update:
update biz_draft_product
company = #{company}, product_name = #{productName}, product_number = #{productNumber}, search_name = #{searchName}, product_type = #{productType}, product_sub_type = #{productSubType}, item_group_id = #{itemGroupId}, item_model_group_id = #{itemModelGroupId}, storage_dim_group_id = #{storageDimGroupId}, tracking_dim_group_id = #{trackingDimGroupId}, buyer_group_id = #{buyerGroupId}, invent_unit_id = #{inventUnitId}, purch_unit_id = #{purchUnitId}, sales_unit_id = #{salesUnitId}, unit_seq_group_id = #{unitSeqGroupId}, purchase_price = #{purchasePrice}, sale_price = #{salePrice}, purch_tax_group_id = #{purchTaxGroupId}, sales_tax_group_id = #{salesTaxGroupId}, use_latest_purch_price = #{useLatestPurchPrice}, use_latest_cost_price = #{useLatestCostPrice}, over_delivery_pct = #{overDeliveryPct}, under_delivery_pct = #{underDeliveryPct}, vendor_account = #{vendorAccount}, vendor_item_number = #{vendorItemNumber}, approved_vendor_check_method = #{approvedVendorCheckMethod}, lifecycle_state_id = #{lifecycleStateId}, retail_category_id = #{retailCategoryId}, financial_dim_item_group = #{financialDimItemGroup}, mobile_device_desc_line1 = #{mobileDeviceDescLine1}, mobile_device_desc_line2 = #{mobileDeviceDescLine2},
main_barcode = #{mainBarcode}, is_weighted = #{isWeighted}, packing_barcodes_json = #{packingBarcodesJson}, price_group_purch_price = #{priceGroupPurchPrice}, price_group_sale_price = #{priceGroupSalePrice}, purch_from_date = #{purchFromDate}, purch_to_date = #{purchToDate}, sales_from_date = #{salesFromDate}, sales_to_date = #{salesToDate},
draft_status = #{draftStatus}, submit_count = #{submitCount}, last_submit_time = #{lastSubmitTime}, d365_response = #{d365Response}, error_message = #{errorMessage}, status = #{status}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = sysdate(), remark = #{remark},
where draft_id = #{draftId}
update biz_draft_product set del_flag = '2' where draft_id in #{draftId}
